properties.name: 11 Grandifloras
properties.description: Sprawling Florida estate with saltwater pool and screened lanai, tucked into mature oaks and pines.

photos.description: Aerial view of the Grandifloras estate surrounded by mature forest and an expansive circular driveway.
Front elevation of the single-story estate with tile roof, arched entry and three-car garage.
Covered front entry with red shutters, patterned tile paving and intimate seating nook.
Open great room with tray ceiling, built-in bookshelves and sliding glass doors to the pool.
Eat-in kitchen with granite island, pendant lighting and sliders opening to the screened lanai.
Generous primary suite with tray ceiling, sitting area and backyard-facing sliders.
Bright guest bedroom with sliding doors leading to the pool patio and a paver deck.
Screen-enclosed saltwater pool and spa with travertine decking, backing to private woods.
Overhead view of the estate's cul-de-sac setting surrounded by acres of preserved woodland.
Daytime front elevation with arched windows, red shutters and three-car garage.
Home office/library with built-in bookshelves, French doors and neutral decor.
Zoomed aerial with locator pin showing the estate and its screened pool on the private lot.

Kitchen detail showing the waterfall island, natural wood cabinetry and pendant lighting.
Sunlit upstairs hallway with oak floors and open stair rail.

Fenced side yard patio with covered area and access to the backyard.

Powder bath with circular gold mirror, navy vanity and modern towel ring.

Aerial showing the home's proximity to downtown Tampa on the horizon.
